# RISMFP UI Redesign Demo

This repository contains an independent historical frontend redesign concept for the Raising Incomes of Small and Medium Farmers Project website.

## Important status

- This is a design and frontend demonstration.
- It is not an official Government of Nepal service.
- It is not operated by RISMFP.
- It is not operated or endorsed by the Asian Development Bank.
- Login controls, forms, reports, news, and other interface elements may be static, incomplete, outdated, or non-functional.
- Do not submit credentials, personal information, financial information, or official records through this demo.

## Technology

- Static HTML
- SCSS and compiled CSS
- Gulp workflow
- Owl Carousel
- Scroll-Out.js

## Repository

https://github.com/Nischhalsubba/rismfp-ui

Use official government or institutional websites for current program information, services, reports, and authentication.
